description: Isometric visual campus layouts where each building or zone represents a product area, department, or feature set — inspired by Miro's What's New showcase boards

templates.name: Product World Map
templates.description: Isometric city-style visual map where each building zone represents a product area with features, roadmap items, and team ownership

templates.name: What's New Showcase
templates.description: Release announcement board styled as an interactive landscape with feature zones, changelog highlights, and adoption metrics

templates.name: Feature Landscape
templates.description: Terrain-style board mapping the entire feature set as a landscape with mountains, valleys, rivers connecting capability areas

templates.name: Department Campus
templates.description: University campus metaphor where each department is a building with rooms for teams, projects, and cross-functional pathways
